artifact.text:
Absolutely — here’s a cleaner, structured version you can use directly.

# Official cross-border data transfer sources by jurisdiction

## EU / EEA

### Primary official sources
- **European Commission – International dimension of data protection**  
  https://commission.europa.eu/law/law-topic/data-protection/international-dimension-data-protection_en
- **European Commission – Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs)**  
  https://commission.europa.eu/law/law-topic/data-protection/international-dimension-data-protection/standard-contractual-clauses-scc_en
- **EDPB – Guidelines 05/2021 on Article 3 and Chapter V GDPR**  
  https://edpb.europa.eu/our-work-tools/our-documents/guidelines/guidelines-052021-interplay-between-article-3-and-chapter-v_en
- **EDPB – Recommendations 01/2020 on supplementary measures**  
  https://edpb.europa.eu/our-work-tools/our-documents/recommendations/recommendations-012020-measures-supplement-transfer_en
- **GDPR Chapter V (EUR-Lex)**  
  https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679/oj
- **EDPB SME guide – International data transfers**  
  https://www.edpb.europa.eu/sme/be-compliant/international-data-transfers_en

### Main transfer mechanisms
- Adequacy decisions
- Standard Contractual Clauses
- Binding Corporate Rules
- Article 49 derogations

---

## UK

### Primary official sources
- **ICO – International transfers**  
  https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/uk-gdpr-guidance-and-resources/data-sharing/international-transfers/
- **UK legislation**  
  https://www.legislation.gov.uk/

### Main transfer mechanisms
- UK adequacy regulations
- International Data Transfer Agreement (IDTA)
- UK Addendum to EU SCCs
- Limited derogations

---

## US

### Primary official sources
- **Data Privacy Framework**  
  https://www.dataprivacyframework.gov/
- **FTC – Privacy and security guidance**  
  https://www.ftc.gov/business-guidance/privacy-security
- **HHS OCR – HIPAA**  
  https://www.hhs.gov/hipaa/index.html

### Key note
- The U.S. does **not** have a single general federal cross-border transfer regime equivalent to GDPR.
- For **EU-to-U.S. transfers**, the main official materials are:
  - European Commission adequacy / SCC materials
  - EDPB guidance
  - Data Privacy Framework materials

---

## China

### Primary official sources
- **CAC main site**  
  https://www.cac.gov.cn/
- **PIPL**  
  Official PRC legal databases / State Council / NPC sources
- **CAC rules on security assessment, standard contracts, and filings**  
  Typically published by CAC and provincial CAC offices

### Main transfer mechanisms
- CAC security assessment
- Certification
- Standard contract filing
- Separate consent
- Transfer impact assessment requirements

---

## Singapore

### Primary official sources
- **PDPC**  
  https://www.pdpc.gov.sg/
- **PDPA text**  
  https://sso.agc.gov.sg/

### Main transfer mechanism
- Transfer Limitation Obligation under the PDPA

---

## Note on source quality

Among the materials mentioned:
- **Official regulator source:**  
  - EDPB SME guide – International data transfers  
    https://www.edpb.europa.eu/sme/be-compliant/international-data-transfers_en
- **Not official guidance:**  
  - PMC articles and similar academic/secondary materials

---

If you want, I can next convert this into either:

1. **
